== Notes for [[Item:Q100600|Q100600]] ==

[http://berdichevsky.tribalpages.com/family-tree/berdichevsky/1195/1252/Yosef-HaLevi-Family '''Berdichevsky-Sokolka FamiliesTree - HaLevi, Yosef''']

Husband of Klara bat Asher, De Lunel

Came from Gerona in Spain

Iggeret Sholomo (Fruchter Yichus) page Tet-Vav (Hay)

There are missing generations between R' Yosef and his ancestor R' Yitzchak Halevi, who died in 1293.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD8534071EFBBFA9822EF79916C2531
geni:302182119970008198

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
